tr.td: Alkaline phosphatase [Enzymatic activity/volume] in Serum or Plasma
Alanine aminotransferase [Enzymatic activity/volume] in Serum or Plasma

Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows significantly elevated creatinine, suggesting impaired renal function. Albumin is slightly high, while globulin is low (possible calculation/unit error; typically g/dL), and alkaline phosphatase is mildly low. Lipid profile reveals mildly elevated cholesterol and triglycerides, indicating increased cardiovascular risk. Other parameters are within normal limits. Recommend further evaluation of renal function and lipid management.

display.value: Acute ST segment elevation myocardial infarction
